name: Laura Smith
description: '''Laura Smith''' (March 1882 – February 1932) was an American [[classic female blues]] and [[country blues]] singer. Songs she recorded include "Gonna Put You Right in Jail" and her version of "Don't You Leave Me Here". She led Laura Smith and her Wild Cats and also worked with [[Clarence Williams (musician)|Clarence Williams]] and [[Perry Bradford]]. Details of her life outside the [[music industry]] are scanty.
